title: 15 Best Things to Do in Magnolia Seattle Neighborhood in 2026
content: # Magnolia Seattle Neighborhood Guide – Food, Cultural Vibes & Things to Do. There are plenty of things to do in Magnolia Seattle, including hiking the trails at Discovery Park, walking along quiet beaches, enjoying waterfront views of Elliott Bay, dining at neighborhood cafés, exploring historic landmarks, and relaxing in one of Seattle’s most peaceful residential areas. When I spend time in Magnolia, my days usually start with a forest hike or bluff walk inside Discovery Park, followed by a beach stroll with views of the Olympic Mountains. In this guide, I’ll share the best things to do in Magnolia Seattle—from iconic parks and beaches to food, culture, and hidden local favorites—so you can experience this quiet peninsula the same way locals do. * **Getting to Magnolia by Car:** From downtown Seattle, I usually take Elliott Avenue W north and cross the Magnolia Bridge (about 10-15 minutes depending on traffic).
